composition_rules_declared: product: independent completion witnesses may be combined when they preserve the same frozen records
sequential: a completion may combine pre-event source state, intervention schedule, and post-event access
quotient: representation and gauge quotients are applied after physical and operational witnesses
cap: whole-family and completed-history witnesses cap global novelty without upgrading to physical causation
excluded_prior_material: anti-collapse throughput remains pre-campaign/incomplete-null-class material and is not counted among the twelve physical-campaign classes
honest_current_result: The twelve tested physical-campaign classes are absorbed by a declared composed CompletionClass v1 panel. This is a scoped class-level absorption over tested classes, not a universal physical no-go. Future candidates must supply a source-owned law, internal anti-after-naming, W4 nonfactorization, native carrier growth, matched resources, and an observable difference from the strongest fixed rival.
